title: Dipcadi brevifolium
taxonomy: Dipcadi brevifolium belongs to the family Asparagaceae. This plant is a member of the genus Dipcadi, which is a group of flowering plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. Asparagaceae is a family of monocot flowering plants that includes species such as asparagus and hyacinth. The classification of Dipcadi brevifolium can be broken down further into its kingdom, which is Plantae. It is also classified under the order Asparagales.
